_meta.description: GREEN zone queries — these are clearly factual, procedural, or arithmetic queries a claims examiner may ask without crossing the UPL boundary. At most 2% may be incorrectly classified as RED (which would block the response). YELLOW is acceptable for Stage 1 keyword-only mode; RED is a violation.
